hypothesis: If the MatAgent framework that couples LLM-driven planning and proposition with diffusion-based crystal-structure generation and iComFormer evaluation is used to iteratively propose compositions and their structures toward predefined target formation energies, then it will achieve a higher success rate in producing structures whose formation energy lies within ±0.25 eV/atom of the target than tool-free LLM baselines and MatterGen, because explicit reasoning, knowledge integration, and iterative feedback enable more efficient navigation of the composition–structure space.
